title: cotula rotundata
intro: Cotula rotundata, also known as round cotula or round buttonweed, is a perennial herb native to southern Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can aid in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits of Cotula rotundata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and act as an antiseptic. The plant can be prepared as an infusion or tincture, and is also used in some traditional remedies as a poultice or ointment.
